sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. 5.875% RED PFD F declares $0.3672 dividend
feed.summary: Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. (NYSE:INN.PF) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.3672 per share for its 5.875% Series F Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. This dividend is payable on June 17, 2024, to shareholders of record as of June 3, 2024, for the dividend period spanning from March 15, 2024, to June 14, 2024.

feed.title: U.S. ETF Express | GraniteShares 2X Long INTC Daily ETF Was the Top Gainer, Rising 24.56%
feed.summary: The GraniteShares 2X Long INTC Daily ETF (NYSEARCA: FBL) experienced a significant surge, rising 24.56% to become the top-gaining ETF. This performance highlights a strong daily movement in the fund tracking Intel Corporation, indicating a potentially volatile but profitable day for investors.

feed.title: Howard Hughes (NYSE: HHH) holder Pershing Square details 46.7% stake
feed.summary: Pershing Square and its related entities have filed Amendment No. 32 to Schedule 13D, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 27,852,064 shares, or approximately 46.7%, of Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. common stock as of April 28, 2026. This amendment reflects a reorganization of Pershing Square's ownership structure and details the individual and shared voting and dispositive powers among the various Pershing Square entities, including PS HHH Holdings, which directly owns 9,000,000 shares. The filing also notes that PS HHH Holdings has entered into a Registration Rights Agreement, granting it certain registration rights for its Howard Hughes shares.

feed.title: New Strong Buy Stocks for April 30th
feed.summary: Zacks Equity Research has identified five new "Strong Buy" stocks for April 30th. These companies, which include Diamondback Energy (FANG), TAL Education Group (TAL), ABB (ABBNY), Kforce (KFRC), and Asahi Kasei (AHKSY), have all seen significant increases in their Zacks Consensus Estimate for current year earnings over the last 60 days. The report encourages investors to review the complete list of Zacks #1 Rank stocks and other best stocks to buy now.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: DVN) reports 46.5M Devon Energy shares (7.5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported beneficial ownership of 46,538,838 shares of Devon Energy Corp (DVN), representing 7.50% of the company's common stock as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made in a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment. Vanguard holds sole voting power for 6,210,711 shares and sole dispositive power for all 46,538,838 shares, managing these securities on behalf of Vanguard funds and client accounts.

feed.title: DTE ties possible rate hike freeze to data center approvals, Nessel says it’s ‘ransom note’
feed.summary: DTE Energy has filed for a $474.3-million electric rate hike, proposing a 9.7% increase for residential customers, but states it could freeze future rate requests for two years if an Oracle data center in Saline Township becomes operational by 2027 and other regulatory approvals are secured. Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel criticized DTE's conditional offer, calling it a "ransom note" as she appeals the Saline contracts and intervenes in the rate case. Ratepayer advocates also argue that DTE customers already face high energy costs for poor reliability and that the proposed increase and DTE's return on equity are excessive.

feed.title: KeyCorp Has Positive Estimate for United Rentals Q2 Earnings
feed.summary: KeyCorp raised its Q2 2026 EPS estimate for United Rentals (NYSE:URI) to $11.46, up from $11.21, maintaining an "Overweight" rating and a $1,150.00 price target. This positive revision comes despite United Rentals missing Q1 earnings and revenue estimates, reporting $9.71 EPS against an expected $11.47, and revenues of $3.99 billion versus $4.20 billion. The company reported a quarterly dividend of $1.97 per share and authorized a $5.00 billion share repurchase program, while high insider selling activity and significant institutional investor holdings were also noted.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Cuts Position in WEC Energy Group, Inc. $WEC
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC reduced its stake in WEC Energy Group by 12.4% in Q4, now holding 101,687 shares. Company insiders also sold shares, totaling approximately $4.86 million, with institutional investors owning a significant 77.20% of the stock. Despite the reduction by Wealthfront Advisers, WEC Energy Group beat Q4 EPS estimates and maintains a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $121.94, while offering a quarterly dividend of $0.9525.

feed.title: A. O. Smith (NYSE: AOS) trims 2026 guidance as China weighs on Q1
feed.summary: A. O. Smith (NYSE: AOS) reported a 2% decline in Q1 2026 net sales to $945.6 million and an 11% drop in diluted EPS to $0.85, largely due to weakening demand in China and lower residential water heater volumes in North America. Consequently, the company has lowered its full-year 2026 guidance, now expecting net sales between $3.9–$4.0 billion and adjusted EPS of $3.70–$4.00, citing continued challenges in China and regulatory uncertainty in North America. A. O. Smith also announced plans for a $20 million restructuring and impairment expense in its North America water treatment business in Q2 2026.

feed.title: AMETEK to acquire First Aviation Services for defense MRO
feed.summary: AMETEK Inc. announced its definitive agreement to acquire First Aviation Services, a provider of defense and aviation maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services, for an undisclosed sum. This acquisition is expected to expand AMETEK's market presence and enhance its component MRO service offerings, building on First Aviation's annual sales of approximately $80 million across six U.S. facilities. The news follows recent positive analyst ratings and a strong performance by AMETEK's stock, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be overvalued.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Increases Position in Verisk Analytics, Inc. $VRSK
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC significantly increased its stake in Verisk Analytics ($VRSK) by 35.2% during the fourth quarter, now owning 31,593 shares worth $7.07 million. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional ownership, which accounts for about 90% of the company's stock. Verisk recently exceeded Q1 earnings and revenue estimates, driven by strong performance in underwriting and claims analytics, and authorized a $2.5 billion share repurchase program alongside a $0.50 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: NiSource Inc. Stock (US65473P1057): Q1 2026 Earnings Release Scheduled for Today
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results today, April 30. Investors will be looking for updates on the utility provider's performance, capital expenditure plans, and progress against its non-GAAP EPS guidance of $1.85 to $2.00 per share for fiscal year 2026. The report is significant for investors given NiSource's role as a dividend-paying utility in the S&P 500 Utilities Index.

feed.title: Ross Stores, Inc. $ROST Shares Purchased by Wealthfront Advisers LLC
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC increased its stake in Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) by 16.4% in the fourth quarter, now owning 39,703 shares valued at approximately $7.15 million. This comes despite recent insider selling by COO Michael Hartshorn and CMO Karen Sykes. Ross Stores reported strong fourth-quarter results, exceeding EPS and revenue expectations, and also increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Despite global disruptions, Royal Caribbean Group says bookings are stronger than last year
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group reported strong first-quarter financial results, with bookings surpassing last year's levels despite geopolitical disruptions in the Middle East and Mexico. The company saw a brief slowdown in bookings for European and Mexican itineraries due to various factors but quickly rebounded, indicating resilient demand for cruise vacations. Royal Caribbean expects continued double-digit revenue and earnings growth, driven by consumer preference for their brands and an expanding portfolio, along with increased onboard spending.

feed.title: Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) lifts 2026 EPS outlook as non-GAAP Q3 profits surge
feed.summary: Cardinal Health reported robust third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, with non-GAAP diluted EPS soaring 35% to $3.17 and revenue increasing 11% to $60.9 billion. Despite a GAAP diluted EPS decline of 20% due to a $184 million goodwill impairment charge, the company raised its fiscal 2026 non-GAAP EPS outlook to $10.70-$10.80 and adjusted free cash flow guidance to $3.3-$3.7 billion, driven by strong operational performance and strategic capital allocation including debt reduction and share repurchases.

feed.title: Martin Marietta (MLM) posts 17% Q1 revenue growth and maintains 2026 EBITDA guidance
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials reported a strong start to 2026, with Q1 revenues from continuing operations increasing 17% to $1.36 billion and adjusted EBITDA rising 14% to $364 million. The company completed a significant asset exchange with QUIKRETE and agreed to acquire New Frontier Materials, enhancing its aggregates portfolio. Despite some margin compression in aggregates, Martin Marietta reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance for adjusted EBITDA at a midpoint of $2.43 billion, driven by robust demand and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Strategic Blueprint LLC Has $1.17 Million Stake in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Strategic Blueprint LLC significantly reduced its stake in GE Vernova Inc. by 34.9%, now holding 1,792 shares valued at $1.17 million. This reduction comes after GE Vernova reported a strong Q1, exceeding EPS and revenue expectations, which led to a stock rally and multiple analyst upgrades. Despite the strong performance, some analysts have raised valuation concerns and one firm, BNP Paribas, downgraded the stock, leading to some profit-taking.

feed.title: NextEra Energy Inc Stock (US65339F1012): HSBC Raises Price Target to $106
feed.summary: HSBC has increased its price target for NextEra Energy Inc (NEE) to $106 from $103, reaffirming a buy rating and suggesting an 11% upside potential. This adjustment follows NextEra Energy's strong Q1 2026 results, which reported an adjusted EPS of $1.09, reflecting a 10% year-over-year increase. The company's business model, combining regulated utility operations with a leading clean energy portfolio, continues to attract investor and analyst confidence.

feed.title: Insmed executives line up two healthcare investor conference talks in May
feed.summary: Insmed (NASDAQ: INSM) announced its management will present at two investor conferences in May 2026: the BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference on May 12 and the 2026 RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference on May 20. Webcasts of both presentations will be available for 30 days on the company's investor relations website. This follows a period of mixed news for Insmed, including positive clinical data and strong financial results, alongside a setback in another study.

feed.title: Insmed to Present at May 2026 Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Insmed Incorporated announced it will present at two investor conferences in May 2026: the BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference on May 12 and the RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference on May 20. These presentations will be webcast live on the company's investor relations website. Insmed is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for serious diseases, with a diverse portfolio including approved and investigational medicines.

feed.title: Homebuilding slowdown hits Builders FirstSource as quarterly sales drop 10%
feed.summary: Builders FirstSource (NYSE: BLDR) reported a 10.1% decrease in net sales to $3.3 billion for the first quarter of 2026, primarily due to a lower housing starts environment, resulting in a net loss of $(47.4) million. Despite the challenging market, the company highlighted its adaptable operating model, strong strategic share growth, and disciplined execution, generating $42.7 million in free cash flow. Builders FirstSource also announced a new $500 million share repurchase authorization and provided a full-year 2026 outlook with net sales projected between $14.6 billion and $15.6 billion.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation Stock (US6516391066): Q1 2026 Earnings Release Scheduled for Today
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 earnings today, April 30, a key event for investors. The report will offer insights into the gold miner's performance, focusing on gold production, costs, and the impact of fluctuating commodity prices. As one of the world's largest gold producers, Newmont's performance is significant for U.S. investors seeking diversification and a hedge against economic uncertainty.

feed.title: Altria Reports 2026 First-Quarter Results; Reaffirms Full-Year Guidance
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. reported its 2026 first-quarter business results, showing a 7.3% increase in adjusted diluted EPS and reaffirming its full-year adjusted diluted EPS guidance of $5.56 to $5.72. The company's smokeable products segment showed strong income growth, while its oral tobacco product *on!* performed well. Altria sustained significant shareholder returns through dividends and share repurchases, with a focus on investing in its "Moving Beyond Smoking" Vision.

feed.title: Indivior Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Raises Full-Year 2026 Guidance
feed.summary: Indivior Pharmaceuticals Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with total net revenue up 19% year-over-year to $317 million, driven by a 32% increase in SUBLOCADE® net revenue to $232 million. The company raised its full-year 2026 guidance, now expecting total SUBLOCADE net revenue growth of 13% and adjusted EBITDA growth of 50% year-over-year. Indivior also announced a share repurchase program and completed a $500 million convertible senior notes offering, while discontinuing internal development for two pipeline assets, INDV-6001 and INDV-2000.

feed.title: International Paper Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP, LSE: IPC) reported Q1 2026 financial results, including net sales of $5.97 billion and earnings from continuing operations of $76 million. The company achieved meaningful progress, particularly in North America, and received $1.1 billion from the sale of its Global Cellulose Fibers business, using $660 million to reduce debt. Despite a volatile macro environment, including inflation and a severe winter storm, the company remains confident in its strategy and its planned separation of North America and EMEA businesses.

feed.title: Copart Inc. Stock (US2172041061): Shares Dip 1.8% Amid Market Volatility
feed.summary: Copart Inc. (NASDAQ:CPRT) shares fell 1.8% on April 30, 2026, amid broader market volatility and geopolitical tensions. The decline aligns with a slip in the NYSE Composite Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average, exceeding the 1.5% threshold for notable intraday shifts. The company, which operates an online auction platform for salvage vehicles, is relevant to U.S. investors due to its dominant market position, but faces risks from economic slowdowns, rising operational costs, and competition.

feed.title: Merck Q1 earnings beat lifts shares; 2026 guidance narrowed (MRK:NYSE)
feed.summary: Merck's Q1 earnings surpassed expectations, leading to a premarket share increase of 5%. The company also narrowed its 2026 revenue guidance to between $65.8B and $67B and raised its adjusted EPS outlook to $5.04-$5.16. Keytruda and Winrevair sales saw significant growth, while Gardasil experienced a decline.

feed.title: Carrier (NYSE: CARR) Q1 2026: orders surge but earnings and cash flow fall
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) reported mixed Q1 2026 results with sales up 2% to $5.34 billion, but significant declines in GAAP operating profit, adjusted EPS, and free cash flow due to margin compression across segments. Despite the financial setbacks, the company saw strong order growth, particularly in data center orders which surged over 500%, and reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance. This indicates a potential timing issue with profitability while demand remains robust for its core products.

feed.title: Avery Dennison raises quarterly dividend 6% to $1.00 per share
feed.summary: Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) has announced a 6% increase in its quarterly dividend to $1.00 per share, marking its 16th consecutive year of dividend increases. The company, a materials science and digital identification solutions provider, reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, exceeding Wall Street expectations, and is currently considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis. Analysts from BMO Capital and Baird have maintained Outperform ratings on the stock.

feed.title: Kimco Realty® Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Kimco Realty (NYSE: KIM) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with Net income per diluted share increasing to $0.23 from $0.18 year-over-year, and FFO per diluted share growing by 4.5% to $0.46. The company saw significant leasing activity, with 4.4 million square feet leased and new lease spreads of 24%, and achieved a record $77 million in future Annual Base Rent from its leased-to-economic occupancy spread. Kimco also updated its full-year 2026 outlook, raising its Net income per diluted share projection.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (MRK) Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, N.J., USA Posts Q1 Adjusted Loss $1.28 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $-1.47
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) reported a Q1 adjusted loss of $1.28 per share, which was better than FactSet's estimated loss of $1.47 per share. The company also announced Q1 revenues of $16.29 billion, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $15.85 billion, and provided a 2026 sales forecast of $65.8 billion to $67.0 billion, with an adjusted EPS range of $5.04 to $5.16.

feed.title: Labcorp (NYSE: LH) lifts 2026 outlook after Q1 EPS and cash flow grow
feed.summary: Labcorp (NYSE: LH) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with revenue increasing by 5.8% to $3.54 billion and diluted EPS rising to $3.35. The company also significantly improved its free cash flow to $70.5 million from a negative figure a year prior. Building on this performance, Labcorp has raised its full-year 2026 guidance for both enterprise revenue and Adjusted EPS, signaling confidence in its continued growth and profitability.

feed.title: Record $40.7B backlog as L3Harris (NYSE: LHX) raises 2026 EPS
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue up 12% to $5.74 billion and GAAP diluted EPS climbing 33% to $2.72. The company secured $7.8 billion in orders, boosting its backlog to a record $40.7 billion, and subsequently raised its 2026 guidance for both revenue and EPS. This performance was driven by broad-based growth across its Space & Mission Systems, Communication & Spectrum Dominance, and Missile Solutions segments.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Stock (US1941621039): Dividend Hike Signals Steady Shareholder Returns
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $1.48 per share, payable on May 15, 2026, marking its 128th consecutive year of dividend payments. This 3.5% hike reflects the company's strong cash flow and commitment to shareholder returns, reinforcing its appeal as a stable investment in the consumer staples sector. The move underscores confidence in its robust business model, supported by strong brand equity and consistent demand for its essential products.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (CAT) Caterpillar Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $17.42B, vs. FactSet Est of $16.53B
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) has reported its Q1 revenue, reaching $17.42 billion, which surpassed the FactSet estimate of $16.53 billion. Additionally, the company announced adjusted EPS of $5.54 per share, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $4.65. This financial update indicates a stronger-than-expected performance for the heavy machinery and vehicles manufacturer in the first quarter.

feed.title: AMETEK lines up First Aviation deal to add defense aircraft repairs
feed.summary: AMETEK (NYSE: AME) has announced an agreement to acquire First Aviation Services, a defense and aviation Maintenance, Repair, and Overhaul (MRO) provider with annual sales of approximately $80 million. This acquisition will expand AMETEK's MRO capabilities to include electronics, rotor blades, propellers, landing gear, and flight controls, strengthening its position in mission-critical defense platforms. The deal is subject to customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (TXT) Textron Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $3.70B, vs. FactSet Est of $3.50B
feed.summary: Textron Inc. (TXT) reported its first-quarter revenue of $3.70 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $3.50 billion. This indicates a stronger-than-expected financial performance for the company in the first quarter.

feed.title: A. O. Smith Q1 EPS Falls to $0.85, Cuts 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: A. O. Smith (NYSE: AOS) reported Q1 2026 sales of $945.6 million and diluted EPS of $0.85, a decrease from the prior year, primarily due to continued weakness in China and lower residential water heater volumes in North America. The company subsequently lowered its full-year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to $3.70–$4.00 and announced a $20 million pre-tax restructuring in North America water treatment. Despite these challenges, A. O. Smith demonstrated strong operating cash flow and free cash flow in Q1, maintained its dividend, and continued share repurchases.

feed.title: Defense demand lifts L3Harris orders to $7.8B, backlog to $40.7B
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with orders reaching $7.8 billion and a record backlog of $40.7 billion, driven by increased defense demand. The company saw a 12% revenue increase and raised its 2026 EPS guidance, reflecting robust growth across all segments. CEO Christopher Kubasik highlighted the company's alignment with critical defense missions and its ability to scale operations to meet evolving global demands.

feed.title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential weigh megamerger - report (AVB:NYSE)
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities and Equity Residential, two of the largest apartment developers in the U.S., are reportedly in exploratory talks for a potential megamerger. Following the news, AvalonBay's stock saw a 2.0% increase. The merger could significantly impact the real estate market given the size of both companies.

feed.title: Big Cidara charge drives Merck (NYSE: MRK) Q1 net loss despite sales growth
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE: MRK) reported a Q1 2026 net loss of $4.240 billion, or $1.72 per diluted share, despite a 5% increase in sales to $16.286 billion. This loss was primarily due to a substantial $9.0 billion non-cash charge related to the acquisition of Cidara Therapeutics. The company’s oncology products, particularly KEYTRUDA, and Animal Health segment showed strong growth, while vaccines and diabetes franchises experienced declines.

feed.title: McKesson Corporation Stock (US58155Q1031): Dividend Hike Signals Steady Shareholder Returns
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation has announced a 6.5% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it to $2.64 per share. This marks the company's 15th consecutive annual dividend increase, reflecting strong financial performance and a commitment to returning value to shareholders. The enhanced dividend is payable on June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 28, 2026.

feed.title: MetLife Inc. Stock (US59156R1086): Dividend Declared for Q2 2026
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.355 per share for Q2 2026, payable on June 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 6, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of May 5, 2026. This decision reflects the company's consistent commitment to returning capital to shareholders, maintaining a stable payout unchanged from the previous quarter. The declaration underscores MetLife's financial discipline and its significant role in the U.S. insurance sector for investors seeking dividend-paying stocks.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Buys 17,514 Shares of Texas Pacific Land Corporation $TPL
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC significantly increased its stake in Texas Pacific Land Corporation by 187.9% in Q4, acquiring 17,514 shares to own a total of 26,833 shares valued at approximately $7.71 million. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a target price of $639 for TPL, following KeyCorp's upgrade to "overweight." The company also reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Reports 2026 Q1 Results, Bookings Recover to Higher Pace
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group reported strong Q1 2026 results with EPS of $3.48 and Adjusted EPS of $3.60, exceeding guidance due to favorable revenue and lower costs. The company's bookings have recovered from geopolitical impacts in March and April, now running at a higher pace than last year, leading to an updated Adjusted EPS outlook of $17.10 to $17.50 for the full year. Royal Caribbean continues to see strong demand and is investing in expanding its portfolio and enhancing its loyalty ecosystem.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Boosts Holdings in Moody's Corporation $MCO
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC increased its stake in Moody's Corporation by 22.7% in Q4 2025, bringing its total holdings to 20,469 shares valued at approximately $10.46 million. This increase occurred despite recent insider selling by key executives and the company's stock trading slightly below its two-hundred day simple moving average. Moody's exceeded its quarterly EPS estimates and provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance, while also declaring a quarterly dividend to shareholders.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Has $10.56 Million Position in The Kroger Co. $KR
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC increased its stake in The Kroger Co. by 15.4% in the fourth quarter, bringing its position to $10.56 million. Major institutional investors like Vanguard and Wellington also hold significant positions in Kroger, with institutional ownership reaching approximately 80.93%. The article notes Kroger's recent EPS beat, FY2026 guidance, and dividend announcement, alongside mixed analyst ratings and an average price target of $74.56.

feed.title: Kimco leased 4.4M square feet as rent spreads hit 24% on new leases
feed.summary: Kimco Realty reported strong Q1 2026 results, with FFO rising to $0.46 per diluted share and net income increasing 28% year-over-year. The company signed 4.4 million square feet of leases, achieving blended new-lease spreads of 23.8%, and updated its full-year 2026 outlook with higher guidance for net income and FFO. Kimco also increased its quarterly common dividend to $0.26 and maintained strong liquidity of approximately $2.2 billion.

feed.title: DTE Energy (NYSE: DTB) details Q1 drop, $36.5B growth plan
feed.summary: DTE Energy reported a dip in Q1 2026 net income and operating earnings compared to 2025 but reaffirmed its 2026 operating EPS guidance, anticipating 6%-8% growth. The company announced significant long-term growth initiatives, including multi-gigawatt data center contracts with Oracle and Google, expected to drive substantial customer affordability benefits and expand its five-year capital plan to $36.5 billion for grid modernization and cleaner generation. These strategic investments are projected to enhance reliability and support DTE's long-term operating EPS growth target through 2030.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Increases Stock Position in Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC significantly increased its stake in Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 28.5% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 19,252 shares valued at approximately $9.04 million. This move comes as Synopsys reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with $3.77 EPS and $2.41 billion in revenue, and issued optimistic FY2026 guidance. Despite some recent price target adjustments by analysts, the stock maintains a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $531.
